positive: Symmetrical, intricate mandala-style illustration of a bioluminescent forest scene. The composition features glowing exotic flora, winding root systems, and crystalline fantasy elements, forming a central, perfect pattern. Style: Highly detailed linework mixed with psychedelic Art Nouveau ink wash, strong contrast, jewel tones (deep indigo, emerald green, amethyst purple). Clean silhouette, magical, ethereal glow, suitable for a repeating apparel print, no depth of field.
negative: blurry, grainy, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, worst quality, out of frame, asymmetrical, extra limbs, extra fingers, poor anatomy, messy lines, simple, sketch
